title: How a Man of God Becomes Worth Choosing
caption:
Most guys are chasing the wrong thing.

They're building up a pitch instead of becoming a man. Running a strategy. Worrying about chemistry, timing, the right read. Underneath all of it is the same fear: what if she doesn't choose me?

But a man of God doesn't start there. He starts with God. The disciplines, the integrity, the real friendships — those aren't just good character traits. They're the fruit of a man who got the order right.

Proverbs 18:22 says he who finds a wife finds a good thing. Notice what it doesn't say: he who chases one, performs for one, or engineers the right conditions. A man who walks with God becomes the kind of man worth finding.

Fix the order. Everything else gets easier.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #christianity #relationships #discipleship #formation
theme: He chases God, not a wife.
